name: Fantasy Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 package (8 oz) Baker's Semi-Sweet Chocolate; broken in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 13x9-inch or 9-inch square pan with the Parkay Spread.
2. Mix the spread, sugar, and milk in a heavy saucepan over medium heat until boiling.
3. Boil for an additional 5 minutes on medium heat, stirring constantly to prevent scorching, until the candy thermometer reaches 234°F (110°C).
4. Remove from heat and gradually stir in the melted chocolate until combined.
5. Add the remaining ingredients; mix well.
6. Pour into the prepared pan.
7. Cool at room temperature.
8. Cut into squares.
High Altitude: For every 1,000 feet above sea level, decrease the recommended temperature by 2°F (about 1°C).
